population: Players with >= 100 WR, 100 TE total snaps, min 6 games

rec_yards_z.what: Total raw receiving yards (full season, REG only).
rec_yards_z.how: From nflverse load_player_stats(summary_level='reg'). Z-scored within position group (WR vs WR, TE vs TE).
rec_yards_z.limits: Raw volume stat — rewards opportunity as much as skill.

receptions_z.how: From nflverse load_player_stats. Z-scored within position group.
receptions_z.limits: Volume stat. High-volume possession receivers outrank efficient deep threats.

rec_tds_z.how: From nflverse load_player_stats — correctly attributed even on lateral plays (which PBP overcounts).

targets_z.limits: Pure opportunity — not a skill measure.

target_share_z.what: Player's share of team passing targets.
target_share_z.how: From nflverse load_player_stats. targets / team total targets.
target_share_z.limits: Team-context dependent. Top option on a low-volume team can outrank #2 on a heavy passing team.

air_yards_share_z.what: Player's share of team intended air yards (downfield throws).
air_yards_share_z.limits: Rewards deep threats; possession receivers near zero by design.

racr_z.what: Receiver Air Conversion Ratio. Yards gained per air yard thrown your way.
racr_z.limits: Inflated by big YAC plays; small-sample players get extreme values.

wopr_z.what: Weighted Opportunity Rating. Combines target share and air-yards share.
wopr_z.how: 1.5 × target_share + 0.7 × air_yards_share. Standard fantasy/analytics opportunity metric.
wopr_z.limits: Opportunity, not skill. Two players with the same WOPR can have very different outcomes.

success_rate_z.what: Percentage of targets that produced a successful play by EPA standards.
success_rate_z.how: Mean of nflverse binary success flag across this player's targets, from PBP.
success_rate_z.limits: Binary cutoff hides near-misses and runaway successes.

first_down_rate_z.what: Percentage of targets that gained a first down.
first_down_rate_z.limits: Depends on usage patterns (slot on 3rd-and-short inflates this).

yards_per_target_z.what: Average yards per target (not per reception).
yards_per_target_z.limits: Penalizes drops as zeros. Rewards big plays disproportionately.

yards_per_snap_z.what: Receiving yards per offensive snap on the field.
yards_per_snap_z.limits: Best available efficiency-of-role metric from free data.

targets_per_snap_z.what: How often the QB looks your way per snap.

yac_per_reception_z.what: Average yards gained after the catch, per reception.
yac_per_reception_z.limits: Credit shared between receiver, scheme, and blockers.

epa_per_target_z.how: Mean of nflverse EPA on this player's targets, from PBP.
epa_per_target_z.limits: Depends on trusting the EPA model.

avg_cpoe_z.how: Actual completion - model-expected completion, averaged across targets.

yac_above_exp_z.what: YAC vs. league-average receiver in the same situations.
yac_above_exp_z.how: NFL Next Gen Stats: actual YAC - expected YAC from tracking data.
yac_above_exp_z.limits: Requires NGS tracking data. Small samples may be unstable.

avg_separation_z.what: Average yards of separation from nearest defender at catch point.
avg_separation_z.how: NFL Next Gen Stats tracking data, season average.
avg_separation_z.limits: Depth-blind — doesn't distinguish route-running from scheme.
